---
title: "Protocol 1: Behavioral Baseline"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
params:
  data_path: "outputs/viz/default.parquet"
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
data_path = "outputs/viz/default.parquet"
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd
from inspect_viz import Data
from inspect_viz.view import scores_by_factor

df = pd.read_parquet(data_path)

def plot_pair(n, pair, factor_labels, title):
    filtered = df[(df["task_arg_n_turns"] == n) & (df["condition_pair"] == pair)].copy()
    if len(filtered) == 0:
        return None
    filtered["instruction_aligned"] = filtered["instruction_aligned"].astype(bool)
    data = Data.from_dataframe(filtered)
    return scores_by_factor(
        data,
        factor="instruction_aligned",
        factor_labels=factor_labels,
        title=title,
        width=900,
        score_value="score_value",
        score_stderr="score_stderr",
    )
```

## Overview

Protocol 1 tests whether models follow instructions (output T) or succumb to induction pressure (output P) as N increases.

## N = 1

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(1, "value", ("Value-misaligned", "Value-aligned"), "N=1: Value Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(1, "factual", ("Truth-misaligned", "Truth-aligned"), "N=1: Truth Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(1, "neutral", ("No hint", "Hint"), "N=1: Hint Effect")
```

## N = 3

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(3, "value", ("Value-misaligned", "Value-aligned"), "N=3: Value Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(3, "factual", ("Truth-misaligned", "Truth-aligned"), "N=3: Truth Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(3, "neutral", ("No hint", "Hint"), "N=3: Hint Effect")
```

## N = 5

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(5, "value", ("Value-misaligned", "Value-aligned"), "N=5: Value Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(5, "factual", ("Truth-misaligned", "Truth-aligned"), "N=5: Truth Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(5, "neutral", ("No hint", "Hint"), "N=5: Hint Effect")
```

## N = 10

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(10, "value", ("Value-misaligned", "Value-aligned"), "N=10: Value Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(10, "factual", ("Truth-misaligned", "Truth-aligned"), "N=10: Truth Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(10, "neutral", ("No hint", "Hint"), "N=10: Hint Effect")
```

## N = 15

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(15, "value", ("Value-misaligned", "Value-aligned"), "N=15: Value Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(15, "factual", ("Truth-misaligned", "Truth-aligned"), "N=15: Truth Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(15, "neutral", ("No hint", "Hint"), "N=15: Hint Effect")
```

## N = 20

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(20, "value", ("Value-misaligned", "Value-aligned"), "N=20: Value Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(20, "factual", ("Truth-misaligned", "Truth-aligned"), "N=20: Truth Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(20, "neutral", ("No hint", "Hint"), "N=20: Hint Effect")
```

## N = 25

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(25, "value", ("Value-misaligned", "Value-aligned"), "N=25: Value Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(25, "factual", ("Truth-misaligned", "Truth-aligned"), "N=25: Truth Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(25, "neutral", ("No hint", "Hint"), "N=25: Hint Effect")
```

## N = 30

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(30, "value", ("Value-misaligned", "Value-aligned"), "N=30: Value Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(30, "factual", ("Truth-misaligned", "Truth-aligned"), "N=30: Truth Alignment")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
plot_pair(30, "neutral", ("No hint", "Hint"), "N=30: Hint Effect")
```
